vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years in primary school, I developed a profound fascination with natural sciences.

vocab.meaning: người nhiệt tình ủng hộ/yêu thích cái gì
vocab.example: I was a keen advocate for physical education because it allowed me to stay active and competitive.

vocab.meaning: phương thức/nơi để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Fine Arts served as a vital creative outlet for me when other academic subjects felt too restrictive.

vocab.meaning: nhiệm vụ khắt khe, đòi hỏi cao
vocab.example: While solving math problems was a rigorous task for many, I found the logic behind them quite exhilarating.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn yên tĩnh (thường chỉ thư viện hoặc phòng nghệ thuật)
vocab.example: The school library was my tranquil sanctuary, where I could immerse myself in historical novels for hours.
Geography lessons really helped to expand my horizons and made me curious about different cultures around the globe.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết tinh tế, sâu sắc
vocab.example: Literature classes gave me a more nuanced understanding of human emotions even at a very young age.
I believe that basic arithmetic and literacy are the foundational pillars of all future academic success.
Music class was the perfect time to recharge my batteries after a long morning of demanding theoretical work.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác/mối liên hệ giữa
vocab.example: I loved the interplay between theory and practice during our weekly science experiments.
